prompt: A colorful anime-style spot-the-difference puzzle made as a side-by-side split image with 2 nearly identical panels separated by a vertical white divider. The scene shows a cozy indoor birthday or party celebration viewed from a slightly elevated angle, with 4 young people grouped closely together in the foreground for a candid photo. Three faces are intentionally blurred with soft rectangular censor blocks, while 1 face remains visible: a cheerful red-haired youth with messy medium-length hair, closed smiling eyes, and a wide grin, standing near the upper right of the group. In the front left, a slim black-haired girl with very long straight hair, pale skin, and large purple-gray anime eyes wears a fitted white long-sleeve top and black pants, leaning inward and pointing playfully toward the girl on the right. Behind her on the left stands another black-haired girl with a high ponytail tied with a mint-green scrunchie, wearing a light top and skirt; one sneaker peeks out at the lower left. In the center is a shorter dark-haired person in a cream cable-knit sweater and gray skirt. On the right is a black-haired girl with twin braids, a cream blouse with ruffled cuffs, and a navy pleated skirt, with the red-haired character’s hand resting on her shoulder. The background is packed with party decorations: many pastel balloons hanging overhead, twisted streamers, colorful confetti floating and scattered, warm string lights with glowing bulbs, a food and drink table covered with a white cloth, plates of snacks, bottles, glasses, and wrapped gift boxes on the floor at the right. The right panel includes exactly 6 red-circled differences highlighted for the puzzle solution: 1 circled missing or altered purple balloon near the top edge, 1 circled changed bottle or glass on the back table, 1 circled pair of round glasses added to the ponytailed girl’s face, 1 circled small red mark or hair accessory near the center figure’s right side, 1 circled missing or altered earring/ear detail on the braided girl at the lower right, and 1 circled changed green sneaker at the bottom left. Soft polished anime rendering, warm festive palette, clean line art, detailed clothing folds, lively celebratory mood, designed like a social-media spot-the-difference comparison image.
